zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruth Carpenter於1730年之前出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆考文垂時，她的父親Jedediah Carpenter33歲，母親Mercy Brown30歲。她於1750年11月12日與Benoni Root Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆勒班農結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruth Carpenter于1730年之前出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆考文垂时，她的父亲Jedediah Carpenter33岁，母亲Mercy Brown30岁。她于1750年11月12日与Benoni Root Clark在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆勒班農结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Ruth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (of uncertain derivation) of a Moabite woman who left her own people to remain with her mother-in-law Naomi, and afterwards became the wife of Boaz and an ancestress of David. Her story is told in the book of the Bible that bears her name. It was used among the Puritans in England in the 16th century, partly because of its association with the English vocabulary word ruth meaning ‘compassion’. It has always been popular as a Jewish name, but is now also widespread among people of many different cultures and creeds.

en.lifeSummary: When Ruth Carpenter was born before 1730, in Coventry, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Jedediah Carpenter, was 33 and her mother, Mercy Brown, was 30. She married Benoni Root Clark on 12 November 1750, in Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruth Carpenter est née avant 1730, à Coventry, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Jedediah Carpenter, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mercy Brown, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Benoni Root Clark le 12 novembre 1750, à Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruth Carpenterが1730年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムコベントリーで生まれた時，父Jedediah Carpenterは33歳，母Mercy Brownは30歳であった。1750年11月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムレバノンでBenoni Root Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruth Carpenter(이)가 1730년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 커븐트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jedediah Carpenter(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mercy Brown(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1750년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 레바넌에서 Benoni Root Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruth Carpenter nasceu antes 1730, em Coventry, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Jedediah Carpenter, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mercy Brown, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Benoni Root Clark em 12 de novembro de 1750, em Lebanon, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruth Carpenter родилась перед 1730 г. в местности ковентри, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Jedediah Carpenter было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mercy Brown, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benoni Root Clark 12 ноября 1750 г. в местности лебанон, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruth Carpenter nació antes de 1730, en Coventry, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Jedediah Carpenter, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mercy Brown, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Benoni Root Clark el 12 de noviembre de 1750, en Lebanon, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
